emails.subject: TFS - Fee Agreement
emails.body: TFS Fee Agreement Dan Attached are a marked and clean version of the Fee Agreement for TFS. I have modified the agreement to reflect that a hard copy of the BETA will be signed and to clean up those areas discussing the online BETA. If these changes are acceptable, please let either me or Tana know as similar changes need to be made to the LOI to ensure consistency. Further, if you and Bob want to keep the Fee Agreement silent as to online BETA's and have agreed that all BETA's will be offline documents, them I will make the appropriate revisions to the form Fee Agreement and BETA to accommodate this change. Please let me know if there is anything further that you should need. Mark Senior Counsel, EWS Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3490 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: TFS - Fee Agreement
emails.body: RE: TFS Fee Agreement Mark/Tana, Thank you, these changes should work out just fine. Please copy me on the revised LOI. I discussed the online BETA with Bob and we agree that it should remain an offline document. Thanks again, Dan
